name: Tse Sui Luen Jewellery (International) Limited
summary: Tse Sui Luen Jewellery (International) Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures, sells, and markets jewelry products in Hong Kong, Macau, Mainland China, Malaysia, and other countries. The company operates through Retail Business, Wholesale Business, and Other Businesses segments. It is also involved in the retail and wholesale of jewelry; property holding and investment businesses; and management and administrative services, as well as logistic and supply chain management activities. The company is based in Hung Hom, Hong Kong. Tse Sui Luen Jewellery (International) Limited is a subsidiary of Partner Logistics Limited.
